blockingIssues.description: `packages/shared/src/provider-instance.ts` still does not make the ProviderConnectionConfig-derived base authoritative for `ProviderInstance`: `ProviderInstance` extends `Partial<ProviderInstanceBase>`, but `providerType` remains the canonical provider field and `extractConnectionFromProvider()` still derives exported `provider` from `providerType`, so `ProfileConfig` and `ProviderInstance` can still diverge instead of sharing one base shape. No new foundation fix feature was completed after round 3 to address this blocker, so it carries forward unchanged.

The deep-import cleanup itself is correct, but review still failed because commit `cf8618f` again bundled unrelated version bumps in `package.json`, `packages/extension/manifest.json`, and `packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json`. That repeats the same scope-discipline failure previously attached to `fix-test-file-line-limits`.

The runtime-message suite split resolves the oversized test file and all replacement suites are under 200 lines, but review still failed because commit `6e4a8f5` again bundled unrelated version bumps in `package.json`, `packages/extension/manifest.json`, and `packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce the completion gate more strictly: require recorded passing evidence for the mandated validation steps, forbid `followedProcedure: true` when required commands were skipped or failed, and add a final diff check that rejects package/manifest version bumps outside explicit release/versioning work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 4 reviews for `fix-test-deep-imports` and `fix-runtime-messages-line-count` both found repeated out-of-scope version bumps, and both reviews also noted handoffs/transcripts that still claim `followedProcedure: true` without evidence for the full required validation checklist.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how version-only cleanup features should be validated and what the contract means by 'no auto-bumped versions in history'—whether HEAD state must be restored exactly, or whether workers are expected to rewrite file history as well.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `fix-version-bump-final` passed by restoring all three version files to `0.4.60` in a scoped `--no-verify` commit, but its reviewer still flagged ambiguity because prior auto-bumped cleanup commits remain in file history even though the current branch state is correct.

rejectedObservations.observation: `.factory/library/architecture.md` is stale for the shared provider-type layout and still references `packages/shared/src/providers.ts`.
rejectedObservations.reason: already documented in `.factory/library/shared-foundation-notes.md` and already triaged in round 3, so no new library update was necessary in this rerun.
